notes: Salva discovery run returned retrieval_health=ok but qualified_count=0 (no entities) -- Salva's partnership-signal discovery model does not surface this kind of static historical/factual roster, so it contributed no data to the final answer. Fell back to WebSearch (1 query) + WebFetch (1 fetch) of the original CNCF founding announcement dated 2015-06-21, which is the authoritative founding-member list distinct from later Dec-2015 'new members' additions. Note: Cloud Foundry Foundation is itself a foundation/consortium, not a single corporation, but was named in the original announcement alongside the corporate founding members.
